# What's new in Copilot Studio

## March 2026

- (Preview) Use Work IQ tools to connect Microsoft 365 Copilot and your agents to the Work IQ service, enabling access to real-time work insights and context from Microsoft 365 files, emails, meetings, chats, and more.

## February 2026

- Improved agent responses for ticket-based Microsoft 365 Graph connectors. Agents more accurately retrieve ServiceNow tickets and Azure DevOps work items and generate clear, actionable summaries.
- Select Claude Sonnet 4.5 (beta) for Computer Use agents. This model improves nuanced decision-making for complex tasks.
- Enhancements to the prompt builder include:
    - Configure content moderation sensitivity per prompt to control how hate/fairness, sexual, violence, and self-harm content is filtered.
    - Optimize prompts with new Claude models by choosing Claude Opus 4.6 or Claude Sonnet 4.5.
    - Edit prompt instructions and settings inline in agent tool details.

## January 2026

- (Preview) New enhancements to agent evaluations:
    - Provide real-time thumbs-up/down feedback on evaluation results.
    - View your agent's sequence of inputs, decisions, and outputs with activity maps.
    - Use a validated CSV template to create test sets.
- (Preview) Expand computer use capabilities with new model support, built-in credentials, enhanced audit logging with session replay, and Cloud PC pooling.
- (General availability) Use the Microsoft Copilot Studio extension for Microsoft Visual Studio Code.

## December 2025

- Compare multiple agent versions side by side to validate improvements and quickly spot regressions when evaluating agents with test sets.

## November 2025

- GPT-5 Chat rolls out to Copilot Studio in general availability for European and United States regions.
- (Preview) Automatically create Microsoft Entra agent identities for agents.
- Improved knowledge retrieval for SharePoint-grounded agents using tenant graph grounding.
- Improve response accuracy with SharePoint metadata filters.
- Orchestrate multiple agents to break down complex tasks across specialized agents.
- (Preview) Add tool groups to agents for faster setup.
- Copy agents from Microsoft 365 Copilot to Copilot Studio.
- (Preview) Add human input to agent workflows with the request for information action.
- Update Power Platform API calls to use the new 'copilotstudio' namespace.
- Use component collections with new enhancements.

## October 2025

- GPT-4o retired; GPT-4.1 becomes default model.
- Choose from multiple AI models to tailor your agent's performance.
- (Preview) Test and deploy GPT-5 models.
- Copilot Studio Kit suite of tools.
- (Preview) Group related user questions into themes.
- Track time and cost savings for both autonomous and conversational agents.
- Access a unified activity and transcript view.
- (Preview) Accelerate flow execution.
- Use the Model Context Protocol (MCP) server.
- (Preview) Evaluate your agents using customizable test sets.

## September 2025

- (Preview) Automate tasks in desktop applications on Windows using Computer-Using Agents (CUA).
- Embed Copilot agents into Android, iOS, and Windows apps using the Client SDK.
- (Preview) Upload Excel, CSV, and PDF files for your agent to analyze using Python code, powered by the code interpreter in chat.

## August 2025

- (General availability) Use code interpreter to generate Python code-based actions from natural language.
- (General availability) Enhance agentic response accuracy using file groups.
- Allow users to upload files and images that your Copilot Studio agent can analyze.
- (General availability) Track and analyze unanswered queries and response generative AI quality.
- Connect to an existing MCP server directly within Copilot Studio.

## July 2025

- Use advanced NLU customization.
- Search across your agent's knowledge, topics, tools, skills, and entities instantly.
- Estimate time and cost savings with ROI analytics.
- View user comments submitted with thumbs up/down reactions in analytics.
- (Preview) Display Microsoft Information Protection (MIP) labels across connectors.
- Publish agents directly to a WhatsApp phone number.
- (Preview) Streamline authentication for Microsoft Entra ID-backed actions with SSO Consent Card.

## June 2025

- Improved experience for tools: grouping/filtering, IntelliSense, improved invocation, automatic SSO detection.
- (Preview) Support for Microsoft 365 Copilot Tuning.
- Actionable insights for unanswered questions grouped by themes.
- Knowledge sources analysis for autonomous agents.
- Power Fx formulas in embedded prompt builder prompt editor.
- Simplified text validation with regular expression support for Power Fx formulas.
- (Preview) Support for file groups as knowledge sources.
- (Preview) Generative orchestration available for all supported languages.
- Redesigned Channels page.
- (US-only preview) GPT-4.1 mini experimental response model.

Updated: 2026-04-01
